taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence Engineer
core_skills: Full-stack development, React, Python, API design, Automation platforms
skill_match_scores: Full-stack development:0.0, React:1.0, Python:1.0, API design:1.0, Automation platforms:0.0
must_have_quals: Have a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or a closely related technical field, Have 2+ years of full-stack professional software engineering experience, You've worked with React and Python for 1+ year and are comfortable building and iterating on user-facing features, Have 1+ year of startup experience and are comfortable with ambiguity and fast iteration, Are strong across backend, frontend, and integrations, not just one layer, Enjoy working on internal tools that directly impact how teams operate, Can translate messy business problems into clean technical systems, Move quickly on 0–1 projects without needing heavy process or direction, Communicate clearly with non-engineering stakeholders and cross-functional partners, Prefer ownership and responsibility over narrowly scoped tickets
preferred_quals: Experience partnering closely with GTM, Ops, Finance, or Legal teams is a plus, Prior work on internal tooling, automation platforms, or workflow systems is a plus, Hands-on experience with CRM, billing, or compliance-related systems is a plus
core_responsibilities: Build Core Business Automations, Design and implement internal tools and workflows that automate key business processes across the company.Own systems end-to-end: requirements, architecture, implementation, deployment, and iteration, HR & Recruiting Automation, Build resume ingestion and candidate evaluation pipelines, including extracting signals and structured attributes from resumes.Implement candidate scoring systems to estimate likelihood of passing interviews.Develop AI-assisted recruiting tools (candidate screening, recruiter assistants, interview coordination).Automate candidate email outreach, follow-ups, and status updates, Security & Compliance Tooling, Build and maintain automations for customer contracts, including BAA, DPA, and DocuSign workflows.Create systems to automate customer security and compliance questionnaires.Partner with legal and security stakeholders to encode compliance logic into reliable tools, Operations & Finance Automation, Build account receivable workflows, invoicing support, and automated customer communications.Develop tooling for enterprise customer onboarding and account setup.Reduce operational overhead by replacing manual processes with robust internal systems, GTM & Revenue Engineering, Build and maintain automations across CRM and GTM systems.Implement customer lifecycle automations across signup, onboarding, expansion, and renewal.Support targeted website, ads, and email personalization workflows.Partner closely with GTM teams to ship tools that directly impact revenue efficiency
job_summary: Retell AI is a cutting-edge voice AI startup reimagining the call center experience. The Senior Software Engineer, AI Automations will build and own internal systems that automate critical business workflows across various functions, working closely with founders and leaders to enhance operational efficiency.
